title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at EY India Asia Pacific Associates - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at EY India Asia Pacific Associates - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
EY India Asia Pacific Associates is actively seeking a talented and motivated Risk Analyst to join our dynamic team in Aurangabad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About EY India Asia Pacific Associates:
EY India Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Budgeting

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with EY India Asia Pacific Associates!
